message: Hi B1, my cost is around 55. What's your valuation? Let's aim for trades around 75-80 to split surplus over 20 rounds.
Valuation 72. 60-65 midpoint fair for both. Let's trade early and often—I'll bid 65 this round.
Great trade last round! With your val 72 and my cost 55, surplus 17. Let's split evenly at 63-64 for steady trades. I'll ask 64 this round—bid at least that?
64 works. I'll bid 64 this round to keep trades flowing. Steady 17 surplus split is good for both.
Good trades so far! Surplus 17, 64 gives fair split (me 9, you 8). I'll ask 64 again—please bid 64 to keep it steady over 20 rounds.
64 keeps us both happy—steady 8 for me, 9 for you. Let's lock it in again this round.
64 still works—steady 8 for me, 9 for you. Let's keep it rolling at 64 again this round.
